name: Lite Strategy, Inc.
business: We are a pharmaceutical company that has been developing novel and differentiated cancer therapies. On August 5, 2025, we announced the commencement of our primary reserve asset and implementation strategy built on a digital asset infrastructure and long-term capital innovation (a Litecoin Treasury Strategy) through our acquisition of Litecoin (LTC) tokens.

exposures.sentence: On August 5, 2025, we announced the commencement of our primary reserve asset and implementation strategy built on a digital asset infrastructure and long-term capital innovation (a Litecoin Treasury Strategy) through our acquisition of Litecoin (LTC) tokens.
We are a pharmaceutical company that has been developing novel and differentiated cancer therapies.
